## Summary

Describe the public-safe change and its user or contributor impact.

## Contribution Type

- [ ] Documentation or policy
- [ ] Installer or validation
- [ ] Extension or theme proposal
- [ ] Training-source metadata
- [ ] Community support files

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate`
- [ ] I used synthetic examples and public links only
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private data, model artifacts, or internal implementation details
- [ ] I reviewed licenses and provenance for any model or dataset metadata

## Contribution License

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that I can license the contribution
under Apache-2.0 and that Reallexi LLC may use it under the project contribution
rules.
